vocab.meaning: bắt đầu một thói quen hoặc sở thích
vocab.example: I actually took up stamp collecting when I was only seven years old after my grandfather gave me his old album.

vocab.meaning: học hỏi hoặc làm một việc gì đó ở mức độ làm quen, không quá chuyên sâu
vocab.example: I used to dabble in watercolor painting as a child, and it has since evolved into a serious passion of mine.

vocab.meaning: bắt nguồn từ, xuất phát từ
vocab.example: My love for gardening stems from the weekends I spent helping my mother in our backyard during my primary school years.

vocab.meaning: tiếp tục kiên trì, gắn bó với một việc gì đó
vocab.example: Although many of my friends changed their interests, I've stuck with playing the piano for over fifteen years.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm, hoàn toàn tập trung vào việc gì
vocab.example: Even as a young kid, I could immerse myself in a book for hours, which developed into my lifelong habit of speed reading.

vocab.meaning: nghịch ngợm, tìm tòi một cách thoải mái (với máy móc, công cụ)
vocab.example: I started messing around with basic computer coding when I was ten, and that hobby eventually dictated my career path.

vocab.meaning: tìm về, dựa vào (một sở thích cũ) như một nguồn an ủi
vocab.example: Whenever life gets stressful, I fall back on sketching, a hobby that has provided me comfort since my early childhood.

vocab.meaning: nhìn lại (một kỷ niệm hoặc quá trình)
vocab.example: I often look back on my early football training sessions with a lot of fondness; they shaped my competitive spirit.

vocab.meaning: rất say mê, thích thú điều gì
vocab.example: I’ve been really into astronomy since I first looked through a telescope at a summer camp in middle school.

vocab.meaning: truyền lại (từ thế hệ này sang thế hệ khác)
vocab.example: The hobby of knitting was passed down to me by my grandmother, and I still find it incredibly therapeutic today.
